ideas.title: Harness engineering layer — hooks, permissions, MCP wiring, session lifecycle as first-class skills
ideas.notes: ON HOLD (2026-06-30). User observation: current toolset focuses on workflow orchestration (ts-deliver, ts-discover, ts-project-planner) but the Claude Code harness layer (hooks, settings.json, MCP server wiring, permissions, session lifecycle) is underserved. Skills like /fewer-permission-prompts and /update-config exist but are thin — no structured harness-engineering skill set.
